metadata.title: County Property Tax Rates and Veteran Exemptions — MI
metadata.description: County-level property tax rates, veteran exemption implementation details, and application information for high-veteran-population counties in metro Detroit.

notes.tax_rate_format: Effective rate per $100 of MARKET value. Michigan assesses at 50% SEV.
notes.scope: Metro Detroit tri-county area — Wayne, Oakland, Macomb (Selfridge ANGB).
notes.update_cycle: Assessed values set annually by local assessors. Rates set by local jurisdictions.
notes.assessment_method: 50% of true cash (market) value = State Equalized Value (SEV). Taxable value capped at lesser of SEV or prior year + 5%/CPI.

metadata._comment: Michigan county property tax data for Culminari for Veterans. Michigan assesses at 50% of market value (State Equalized Value / SEV). 100% P&T disabled veterans receive full property tax exemption under MCL 211.7b.

veteran_exemption_state_law.description: Full property tax exemption on principal residence for 100% P&T disabled veterans. No income test. No reapplication required once granted (as of 2025 law change).
veteran_exemption_state_law.surviving_spouse_conditions: Unremarried surviving spouse of eligible veteran retains exemption

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~1.73% of market value. Highest in MI. Includes Detroit and surrounding suburbs. Assessment = 50% of market value.
property_tax._proposal_a_note: Under MI Proposal A, taxable value uncaps to SEV (50% of market) on sale. Rates reflect new-buyer effective rate against market value — higher than community average due to uncapping.

application.office: Wayne County Assessor / Local City Assessor
application.deadline: No fixed deadline — file with local assessor

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~1.36% of market value. Affluent suburban county north of Detroit.
property_tax._proposal_a_note: Under MI Proposal A, taxable value uncaps to SEV (50% of market) on sale. Rates reflect new-buyer effective rate against market value — higher than community average due to uncapping.

application.office: Oakland County Equalization / Local City Assessor
application.deadline: No fixed deadline — file with local assessor

property_tax._note: Effective rate ~1.47% of market value. Home to Selfridge ANGB — 127th Wing, MI Air National Guard.
property_tax._proposal_a_note: Under MI Proposal A, taxable value uncaps to SEV (50% of market) on sale. Rates reflect new-buyer effective rate against market value — higher than community average due to uncapping.

application.office: Macomb County Equalization / Local City Assessor
application.deadline: No fixed deadline — file with local assessor

va_facilities: Lt. Col. Charles S. Kettles VAMC (Ann Arbor)

property_tax._note: Highest property tax bills in MI ($5,505 median). Home to University of Michigan. Under Proposal A, TV uncaps to SEV (50% of market) on sale.
property_tax._proposal_a_note: Under MI Proposal A, taxable value uncaps to SEV (50% of market) on sale. Rates reflect new-buyer effective rate against market value — higher than community average due to uncapping.

disabled_veteran_100_pct._note: MI Disabled Veterans Exemption Act (PA 161 of 2013) provides full exemption from property tax.
